Voice 1 (stepfun-flash):
- Segments .ai domains into three: AI-native B2B SaaS & developer tooling; SMB & vertical AI service providers; AI consumer apps & content tools.
- For segment 1: prioritize developer community channels (Hugging Face Spaces, GitHub Discussions, Dev.to), Product Hunt launches, targeted LinkedIn Ads to CTOs/engineering managers. Cites numbers: 68% of AI tooling leads from developer community (State of AI Marketing 2024), 42% of AI SaaS companies get 30%+ first 100 leads from Product Hunt, 15% lower CPL for targeted LinkedIn ads vs generic (HubSpot 2024), Hugging Face gets 22% leads from community forum/model hub.
- For segment 2: prioritize local/vertical SEO (72% of SMBs search "best AI [use case] for [industry]" per BrightEdge 2024, 40% higher conversion vs generic social ads), TikTok/Instagram Reels (61% of SMB owners discover via short-form demos per Meta 2024), niche industry forum sponsorships (3x higher lead quality vs generic Facebook ads per G2 2024).
- For segment 3: prioritize creator affiliate programs (58% of consumer AI tool leads from creator referrals per Influencer Marketing Hub 2024, Midjourney affiliate drives 35% new user leads with 22% conversion), App Store/Google Play optimization (47% of consumer AI app downloads from app store search per Sensor Tower 2024), Pinterest for visual AI tools (39% of users searching AI art/design click through from Pinterest pins per Pinterest 2024 internal data).
